title: Geepas 11-in-1 Rechargeable Multi Grooming Kit – Ultimate Grooming Trimmer Set for Beard & Hair Clipper - Nose/Ear, Shaver, 4 Combs and Hair Clipper - 2 Years Warranty
features: 11 in 1 ULTIMATE GROOMING KIT - Precision shaving system design including beard/hair/nose trimmer, body groomer. The package comes with 11 accessories, everything you need to get started on the grooming. It includes a Precision trimmer head Ear/Nose trimmer, Hair Clipper, Micro Head Shaver, Beard Trimmer, Cleaning Brush, BS Adaptor, 4 Combs for Hair clipper (3mm, 6mm, 9mm, 12mm), 1 comb for beard trimmer.

CHARGING STAND - This device charges really fast. With an rechargeable 1.2V Ni-mh 700mah battery, a single complete charge requires only 2 hours. Long-lasting lithium battery is perfect for travelling.

MOVING & STANDING BLADES RUN TOGETHER - The stainless steel moving and standing blades with precision gap, deep close to the skin, more pruning and low-friction heat, doesn’t produce high-temperature scalded your skin.
MICRO SHAVER - This flexible shaving heads follows every curve of your face and neck to give you a comfortable and smooth shave even in tough to reach areas.
FULL HAIR TRIMMER - This hair clipper can capture more hair in each stroke for faster trimming, hair cutting and fading suitable for backhand carving hair design.
description: Product Description ULTIMATE GROOMING SET Precision shaving system with beard, hair, nose trimmer & body groomer – complete grooming solution. 2 SPEED SETTINGS Comes with 2 adjustable speed settings, offering precise control and smooth performance every time. STAINLESS STEEL BLADE Stainless steel blades deliver superior cutting performance – finer teeth ensure premium precision quality. MULTIPLE STYLING OPTIONS Precision trimmer, nose/ear trimmer, clipper, micro shaver, beard trimmer with brush & BS adaptor. EASY TO USE Removable comb attachments for versatile styling, easy use, and smooth grooming every time. RECHARGEABLE BATTERY Fast charging device with 1.2V Ni-MH 700mAh battery – Full recharge in just 2 hours for reliable use. CLEANING BRUSH This device includes a cleaning brush for effortless maintenance and hassle-free cleaning. REMOVABLE ACCESSORIES Multi grooming kit with beard trimmer, shaver, nose ear clipper, precision trimmer & 5 combs.
